meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: This Privacy Policy describes how AVİTO TURİZM TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ (hereinafter referred to as the “Company” or “We”) collects, uses, processes, and protects the personal data of users who book transfer services via the website, messengers, phone, or other channels.

sections.title: General Provisions
clauses: This Policy applies to all data received from individuals (hereinafter referred to as “Users”) when booking transfer services.
Data is processed in accordance with the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK) and other applicable regulations.
By placing a booking, the User confirms agreement with this Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Data Controller
clauses: The data controller is:
AVİTO TURİZM TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ
License No: 12520
Address: YENİŞEHİR MAH. ANKARA CAD. NO:405 İÇ KAPI NO:60, PENDİK, ISTANBUL
Email: info@avitovip.com

sections.title: Personal Data We Collect
sections.description: We may collect the following categories of data:
items: Trip details: date, time, route, flight number
Any other information voluntarily provided during booking
sections.note: Important: We do not collect or store bank card details — all payments are handled securely by third-party payment providers.

sections.title: Purpose of Data Processing
sections.description: Personal data is processed exclusively for the following purposes:
items: sending confirmations, notifications, and follow-up messages
compliance with legal requirements (e.g. tax and accounting)

sections.title: Legal Basis for Processing
items: necessity to perform a contract (transfer booking)
Company’s legitimate interests (e.g. fraud prevention, service quality)

sections.title: Data Storage and Transfers
clauses: All personal data is stored securely and accessed only by authorized personnel.

clauses.title: Data may be shared with:
items: drivers and partners involved in delivering the transfer service
government authorities — only as legally required

clauses: We do not share personal data with third parties for marketing without explicit consent.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.description: Personal data is retained for as long as necessary for the purposes described:
clauses: typically up to 3 years after trip completion
longer if required for accounting/tax purposes
feedback data is stored until review is complete
After these periods, data is securely deleted or anonymized.

sections.title: User Rights
items: request information about their personal data
file a complaint with a supervisory authority
sections.note: To exercise these rights, contact us via: info@avitovip.com

sections.title: Data Security
sections.description: We implement administrative, technical, and physical measures to protect personal data from:
sections.note: All information is transmitted using secure channels and modern encryption protocols.

sections.title: Cookies and Analytics
clauses: The website may use cookies and analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics) to collect anonymized statistics and improve service quality. Users may disable cookies in their browser settings.

sections.title: Policy Updates
clauses: We reserve the right to update this Policy. The latest version will always be available at: https://avitovip.com
Last updated: April 10, 2025

meta.title: Offer for the Provision of Transfer Booking Services
meta.description: This document is a public offer by AVİTO TURİZM TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ, registration number 208525-5, located at YENİŞEHİR MAH. ANKARA CAD. NO:405 İÇ KAPI NO:60 PENDİK, ISTANBUL, Turkey, holding tourism license No. 12520, hereinafter referred to as the “Provider”, addressed to any individual or legal entity (hereinafter referred to as the “Client”) under the following terms and conditions:

sections.title: Definitions
clauses: Provider – AVİTO TURİZM TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ, a company registered in Turkey and providing private transfer services under license No. 12520.
Client – an individual or legal entity submitting a request and paying for transfer services.
Service – the organization and provision of transportation of passengers and their luggage along a specified route and schedule.
Booking Request – a service order made by the Client through the website, email, WhatsApp, or phone. Submission of a request implies acceptance of this Agreement.
Voucher – a document (digital or otherwise) confirming the transfer details and payment or payment terms.
Promo Code – a code provided by the Provider that may be entered during booking for a discount or benefit.

sections.title: Subject of the Agreement
clauses: The Provider undertakes to provide the Client with private transfer services, and the Client agrees to accept and pay for the Services as per this Agreement.

The Service includes the transportation of the Client or designated passengers and their luggage from a departure to a destination point at a pre-agreed time using a vehicle of suitable class and capacity.
Booking may be made through the Provider’s website, email (e.g., info@avitovip.com), messengers, or phone.

sections.title: Terms of Service
clauses: The Client must provide accurate and complete booking details, including: departure/destination, date and time, flight number (if applicable), number of passengers, and their names.
Contact details (name, phone number, email) must be correct and up to date for communication and updates.
The Provider will supply a safe, clean, and operational vehicle with a professional driver in line with the confirmed booking.
The Client and passengers must arrive on time at the agreed pickup point. Delays caused by the Client may shorten the transfer time or lead to cancellation without compensation.
Changes to the order (route, time, number of passengers) must be promptly communicated. The Provider will try to accommodate changes but cannot guarantee them after confirmation.

Waiting time: Waiting time varies by location. In major airports like IST/SAW, waiting may be extended without extra charges depending on the flight. Elsewhere, free waiting may be limited (e.g., 15–60 minutes). Beyond that, additional fees may apply.
Minors: Children under 14 must be accompanied by an adult. The Client must notify the Provider in advance and may request a child safety seat.

sections.title: Payment Terms
clauses: Pricing is based on route, vehicle class, and other order parameters. The confirmed price remains fixed unless the Client changes the order.
Payment: The Client pays either online in advance or, where permitted, in cash to the driver. Available payment methods are listed on the Provider's website or offered via support.

Online Payment: Payments are processed by a third-party payment gateway via secure SSL and 3-D Secure technologies. The Provider does not collect or store card data. Payment is considered complete upon confirmation from the payment processor.

sections.title: Price and Payment Procedure
clauses: Provider's Liability: The Provider is liable for proper delivery of Services unless prevented by force majeure (natural disasters, government restrictions, transport issues, etc.).
Client's Liability: The Client is responsible for providing accurate data and complying with all terms. The Client covers any damages to the vehicle or other property caused by passengers.
The Provider is not liable for delays or missed services caused by incorrect client information or force majeure.
In case of delays caused by the Client (e.g., customs, luggage), the Provider may reduce service time or treat it as completed after the free waiting period.

sections.title: Privacy and Data
clauses: The Provider collects personal data (names, contacts, travel details) solely to fulfill the booking. Data may be shared with drivers, partners, or payment processors as needed.
By booking, the Client consents to data processing as per the Provider’s Privacy Policy. Consent may be withdrawn in writing.
Data is protected using reasonable technical and organizational security measures.

sections.title: Cancellation Policy
clauses: The Client may cancel the booking at least 24 hours before the scheduled pickup to receive a full refund. Later cancellations are non-refundable.
Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5–30 working days, depending on the payment processor and banks involved.
The Provider may cancel a booking due to force majeure, technical issues, or legal restrictions, in which case a full refund is offered.

sections.title: Promo Codes
clauses: Promo codes may be applied during booking for discounts or benefits, if still valid.
Codes are usually valid for a limited time and may be used once unless otherwise stated. They cannot be exchanged for cash or combined unless specified.
The Provider may change or cancel promo codes at any time.

sections.title: Final Provisions
clauses: This Agreement is a public offer. Booking a transfer and/or making a payment constitutes full acceptance.
This Agreement is governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey.
Disputes shall be resolved amicably or, if necessary, in a competent court at the Provider’s place of registration.
If any provision is held invalid, the remainder shall remain in force.
In case of discrepancies between this English version and the original Turkish version, the Turkish version shall prevail.

Acceptance of terms and conditions: By placing an order (Application) for transfer, the Customer confirms that he has read the terms and conditions of this Agreement, understands them and accepts them in full. The Customer also confirms that he/she has the necessary legal capacity to conclude this Agreement. Receipt by the Contractor of the Application from the Customer means the acceptance by the Customer of this offer and conclusion of the Agreement on the stated conditions.
